_meta.provenance: Shared government stakeholder registry. Organisations are real (existence verifiable via systems register sources where linked); the roles proposed for each module are KHELO BHARAT design and require government confirmation. No individual officers are named — roles only.

stakeholders.name: Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports (MYAS)
stakeholders.description: Nodal ministry for sport; owns Khelo India, Fit India, TOPS; administers the National Sports Governance Act 2025.

stakeholders.name: Sports Authority of India (SAI)
stakeholders.description: Executing agency: schemes, NCOEs, STCs, assessments; operates NSRS.

stakeholders.name: National Sports Board (NSB)
stakeholders.description: Statutory recognition and regulation of sports bodies under NSGA 2025 (select provisions in force 31 Dec 2025).

stakeholders.name: National Sports Tribunal
stakeholders.description: Statutory sports dispute tribunal under NSGA 2025; draft rules published.

stakeholders.name: State Sports Departments / State SPOCs
stakeholders.description: State schemes, facilities, district monitoring; structures vary by state.

stakeholders.name: District Education Officers (DEOs) & schools
stakeholders.description: School-system channel for screening games and school data.

stakeholders.name: National Sports Federations (NSFs) & state units
stakeholders.description: Recognition subjects under NSGA 2025; sanction events, verify results, run selections.

stakeholders.name: Controller General of Accounts (CGA), Ministry of Finance
stakeholders.description: Owns PFMS — fund sanction/release/utilisation and DBT rails.

stakeholders.name: National Informatics Centre (NIC), MeitY
stakeholders.description: Builds/operates eOffice and much government IT infrastructure.

stakeholders.name: DARPG (Department of Administrative Reforms & Public Grievances)
NeGD / MeitY (DigiLocker, API Setu, hosting empanelment)
stakeholders.description: Digital-infrastructure gatekeepers: DigiLocker partner onboarding, API Setu, MeghRaj cloud empanelment; administers the DPDP Act.

stakeholders.name: Ministry of Education (MoE) & education boards
stakeholders.description: UDISE+, APAAR, NCrF policy; boards decide marks/credit recognition.

stakeholders.name: NPCI & issuing banks
stakeholders.description: RuPay network and co-branded card programmes.

stakeholders.name: NADA India
stakeholders.description: Anti-doping authority under MYAS; testing data lives in WADA's ADAMS.

stakeholders.name: DPIIT / BISAG-N (PM GatiShakti)
stakeholders.description: Own and build the national GIS master-plan platform.

stakeholders.name: CSR corporates, donors & sponsors
stakeholders.description: Fund verified needs through the CSR exchange.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Provide official organisation structure, sanctioned-posts list and nodal officers; confirm quarterly.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Administrative approval to release and publish structure.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Ministry-level structure and scheme-division mapping.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Policy approval for a public national directory.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: State department structures, DSO jurisdictions.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: State consent to list structures and role contacts.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Post-Act governance bodies and their remits.
Recognition register: status, orders, conditions (as NSB assumes powers under NSGA 2025).
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Source of truth for recognition decisions.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Historic/current recognised-NSF list during NSB transition.
Compliance filings: elections, office bearers, audits, safe-sport.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Federation consent for publishing compliance scorecards.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: File on time; maintain affiliation trees.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Dispute outcomes affecting recognition or office bearers.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve publication scope of tribunal outcomes.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Central scheme masters: eligibility rules, benefits, budgets.
Sanction/release/utilisation status for sports schemes (PFMS).
eOffice file-status events for scheme files.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Technical integration approval with the file-owning ministry.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: DigiLocker issued-document verification.
State scheme masters and application workflows.
Field verification of applicant claims.
CPGRAMS case categories and cross-references for sports grievances.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve interoperability model (avoid a duplicate national channel).

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Grievance SLA policy, category taxonomy, escalation matrix.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve SLAs and the escalation matrix.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Ministry grievance cell resolves central cases.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: State resolver hierarchy and jurisdiction mapping (via M1).
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: State adoption of SLAs (cannot be centrally mandated).

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Federation-level grievance handling (selection disputes route to athlete commissions/Tribunal per NSGA).
UDISE+ school data linkage; APAAR consent framework; screening window in the school calendar.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve screening in school time and education-data linkage (A-M5-4).

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Conduct screening sessions; capture results on the offline-first School App.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Run the annual screening cycle per protocol.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Own the test protocol (aligned with Fit India GOALS); operate KIRTI referral intake.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Train assessors; run Talent Assessment Centres.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: District screening coverage and equipment readiness.
Teacher service-rule position on scout duties (state subject).
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Permit teachers to hold scout roles (A-M6-1).

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Recognition and award policy for scouts.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve the reward structure (A-M6-2) — any monetary element needs financial approval.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Scout training curriculum (NIS Patiala / e-Khel Pathshala).
Nominate teachers; verify claimed screening activity.
NSRS identity records (KID); KIRTI and sports-science assessment data.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: NSRS integration approval (A-M7-1) — the platform's single most important approval.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Operate the identity source of record.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Verify competition results before they enter the timeline.
Doping status flags (never test details).
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve the flag-sharing arrangement (A-M7-3) within WADA rules.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: AI talent-score governance policy.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: Approve advisory-only AI policy with bias audit and appeal path (A-M7-2).

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Event sanctioning; results sign-off; officials assignment.
moduleRoles.operationalResponsibility: Run federation events on the platform calendar.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: Khelo India Games calendar and GMS results.
State games calendars and results.
moduleRoles.approvalResponsibility: State adoption of the event standard.

moduleRoles.dataResponsibility: DigiLocker certificate issuance rails.
